title.en: Ashkenazi vs. Sephardi: Understanding the Two Great Jewish Traditions
title.zh: 阿什肯纳兹与塞法尔迪:理解犹太人的两大传统
title.he: אשכנזים וספרדים: הבנת שתי המסורות הגדולות של העם היהודי

description: A detailed comparison of customs, cuisine, prayer styles, and halachic rulings between Ashkenazi and Sephardi Jews.
author: Torah Light Editorial Team

historical_periods_referenced.jewish_context: Development of Ashkenazi communities in Rhine Valley
Spanish Expulsion (1492), Rema's lifetime, Shulchan Aruch compilation
Founding of Chasidism by the Baal Shem Tov

cultural_parallels: Northern vs. Southern China: different cuisines, dialects, customs yet all Chinese
Mandarin and Cantonese: different tones and vocabulary but same written language
Confucianism, Daoism, Buddhism: different schools within Chinese civilization
Chinese diaspora maintaining distinct local customs while remaining culturally Chinese
